name: VenuePro — Create Recurring From Calendar (Phase 2 — db-api)

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  customer_id:    $('Code: Validate').first().json.customer_id,
  room_id:        $('Code: Validate').first().json.room_id,
  series_name:    $('Parse: Input').first().json.series_name
                    || ($('Code: Validate').first().json.customer_name + ' Block'),
  cycle_amount:   parseFloat($('Parse: Input').first().json.monthly_fee
                    || $('Parse: Input').first().json.agreed_price
                    || $('Parse: Input').first().json.monthly_rate
                    || $('Parse: Input').first().json.rate_per_session
                    || '0') || 0,
  payment_amount: parseFloat($('Parse: Input').first().json.payment_amount || '0') || 0,
  start_time:     $('Parse: Input').first().json.start_time   || '',
  end_time:       $('Parse: Input').first().json.end_time     || '',
  frequency:      $('Parse: Input').first().json.frequency    || 'weekly',
  end_date:       $('Parse: Input').first().json.end_date     || '',
  day_of_week:    parseInt($('Parse: Input').first().json.day_of_week ?? '1'),
  payment_timing: $('Parse: Input').first().json.payment_timing || 'in_advance',
  billing_type:   $('Parse: Input').first().json.billing_type
                    || $('Parse: Input').first().json.billing_frequency
                    || 'monthly',
  notes:          $('Parse: Input').first().json.notes || ''
}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({
  customer_id:         $('Code: Validate').first().json.customer_id,
  room_id:             $('Code: Validate').first().json.room_id,
  dates_csv:           $('Code: Filter Dates').first().json.filtered_dates || '',
  start_time:          $('Parse: Input').first().json.start_time || '',
  end_time:            $('Parse: Input').first().json.end_time   || '',
  rate_per_session:    parseFloat($('Parse: Input').first().json.rate_per_session || '0') || 0,
  rule_id:             null,
  series_id:           $('HTTP: POST /recurring/create-series-calendar').first().json.body?.data?.series_id || null,
  series_label:        $('HTTP: POST /recurring/create-series-calendar').first().json.body?.data?.series_name || 'Recurring',
  status:              $('Parse: Input').first().json.status || 'confirmed',
  paid_sessions_count: $('Code: Validate').first().json.paid_sessions_count || 0
}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({
  customer_id:      $('Code: Validate').first().json.customer_id,
  payment_amount:   parseFloat($('Parse: Input').first().json.payment_amount || '0') || 0,
  payment_type:     $('Parse: Input').first().json.payment_type   || 'none',
  payment_method:   $('Parse: Input').first().json.payment_method || 'cash',
  series_reference: $('HTTP: POST /recurring/create-series-calendar').first().json.body?.data?.series_reference || '',
  series_id:        $('HTTP: POST /recurring/create-series-calendar').first().json.body?.data?.series_id || null,
  cycle_number:     1,
  period_start:     $('Code: Generate Dates').first().json.first_period_start || '',
  period_end:       $('Code: Generate Dates').first().json.first_period_end   || '',
  cycle_amount:     parseFloat($('Code: Generate Dates').first().json.first_month_amount || '0') || 0,
  billing_type:     $('Parse: Input').first().json.billing_type || $('Parse: Input').first().json.billing_frequency || 'monthly',
  total_sessions:   parseInt($('Code: Filter Dates').first().json.dates_count || '0') || 0
}) }}

parameters.responseBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  success: true,
  status: 'created',
  series_id:           $('HTTP: POST /recurring/create-series-calendar').first().json.body?.data?.series_id   || null,
  series_name:         $('HTTP: POST /recurring/create-series-calendar').first().json.body?.data?.series_name || null,
  series_reference:    $('HTTP: POST /recurring/create-series-calendar').first().json.body?.data?.series_reference || null,
  customer_id:         $('Code: Validate').first().json.customer_id,
  customer_name:       $('Code: Validate').first().json.customer_name,
  booking_count:       $('Code: Filter Dates').first().json.dates_count,
  paid_sessions:       $('HTTP: POST /recurring/insert-bookings').first().json.body?.paid_sessions || 0,
  unpaid_sessions:     $('HTTP: POST /recurring/insert-bookings').first().json.body?.unpaid_sessions || 0,
  cycle_amount:        $('HTTP: POST /recurring/create-series-calendar').first().json.body?.data?.cycle_amount   || null,
  balance_due_initial: $('HTTP: POST /recurring/create-series-calendar').first().json.body?.data?.balance_due   || null,
  frequency:           $('Parse: Input').first().json.frequency     || null,
  booking_source:      $('Parse: Input').first().json.booking_source || 'calendar_recurring',
  partial_booking:     $('Code: Filter Dates').first().json.has_conflict || false,
  warning:             $('Code: Filter Dates').first().json.warning || null,
  first_conflict_date: $('Code: Filter Dates').first().json.first_conflict_date || null
}) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Your recurring booking is confirmed — ' + ($('HTTP: POST /recurring/create-series-calendar').first().json.body?.data?.series_name || 'Recurring Series') }}
parameters.message:
={{ 'Dear ' + ($('Code: Validate').first().json.customer_name || 'Customer') + ',

Your recurring series for ' + ($('Parse: Input').first().json.room_name || 'the room') + ' has been created.

Total sessions: ' + ($('Code: Filter Dates').first().json.dates_count || 0) + '
Initial payment of £' + ($('Parse: Input').first().json.payment_amount || 0) + ' received.' + ($('HTTP: POST /recurring/create-series-calendar').first().json.body?.data?.series_reference ? '
Series reference: ' + $('HTTP: POST /recurring/create-series-calendar').first().json.body.data.series_reference : '') + '

Thank you for your booking.

VenueDesk' }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, status: 'unavailable', message: $('Code: Filter Dates').first().json.warning || 'Room not available for the requested dates.' }) }}
